candidate_definition_hints.text: Streamline your web application's authentication with Polis, an SSO service supporting SAML and OpenID Connect protocols. Beyond enterprise-grade Single Sign-On, it also supports Directory Sync via the SCIM 2.0 protocol for automatic user and group provisioning/de-provisioning.
Ory polis - Open source Enterprise SSO and Directory Sync

candidate_glosses.text: Ory polis - Open source Enterprise SSO and Directory Sync

source_context_snippet: Ory polis - Open source Enterprise SSO and Directory Sync
source_repo_description: Streamline your web application's authentication with Polis, an SSO service supporting SAML and OpenID Connect protocols. Beyond enterprise-grade Single Sign-On, it also supports Directory Sync via the SCIM 2.0 protocol for automatic user and group provisioning/de-provisioning.
